subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Protector of the distressed, Companion of the yearning ones, Helper of those who place their trust in Thee, and Refuge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا مجیر المضطرین و سمیر المشتاقین و نصیر المتوکلین و ملجاء
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
